raw_response: {"detections":[{"biasType":"Spin","biasedText":"A new study showed another disastrous effect of the pandemic on kids — a spike in gun injuries.","explanation":"The word 'disastrous' is an interpretive, emotionally charged characterization by the author rather than a neutral description of the study's findings."},{"biasType":"Spin","biasedText":"homicide rates have recently gone up a lot for males, black children, Hispanic kids","explanation":"The phrase 'a lot' is vague and imprecise language used by the author in place of specific data, adding a sensational tone to the reporting."}]}

detections.biasedText: A new study showed another disastrous effect of the pandemic on kids — a spike in gun injuries.
detections.explanation: The word 'disastrous' is an interpretive, emotionally charged characterization by the author rather than a neutral description of the study's findings.
